backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Urban Thekedaar backend, handling user profiles, query/contact form submissions, and construction estimate calculations with role-based access control via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three implemented features (removing ProfileSetup modal, updating hero headline, replacing admin Internet Identity auth with hardcoded login) to their affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key changes made to each component, hook, and style file.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Urban Thekedaar React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing scroll-based section navigation via refs, admin panel visibility state, and rendering all page sections including the conditionally shown AdminPanel with a back-to-site header.
frontend/src/components/AboutUs.tsx: About Us section component rendered as a forwarded ref, displaying a multi-paragraph company description and four principle cards (Live Project Tracking, Fair Pricing, On-Time Delivery, Build Quality) with Lucide icons.
frontend/src/components/AdminInquiries.t: A React component that displays all submitted contact form inquiries for admin users, showing name, email, phone, and message details in cards. It uses role-checking hooks to hide itself entirely from non-admin users and shows loading skeletons while fetching data.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: A standalone admin panel component with hardcoded credential-based login that displays three tabs of data: query forms, contact forms, and calculator leads. It renders each entry as a styled card with relevant fields using shared InfoRow, QueryCard, ContactCard, and LeadCard sub-components.
frontend/src/components/Chatbot.tsx: A floating chatbot widget with two tabs—an FAQ chat interface and a query submission form. It matches user input against a keyword-response map for instant answers and falls back to prompting contact, while also supporting quick-reply buttons and a service-type selector.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: A contact section component with a form for name, email, phone, service type, and message that submits via a mutation hook and shows toast notifications on success or error. It also displays static contact info cards for phone, email, and location.
frontend/src/components/EstimateCalculat: A multi-step construction cost estimate calculator that collects project type, area, floors, quality tier, and contact/address details across three steps, then calls a backend mutation to return a formatted cost estimate. Results are displayed in a fourth step with currency formatting for crores and lakhs.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A simple footer component displaying copyright, contact info, and a 'Built with caffeine.ai' attribution link. It dynamically uses the current year and encodes the hostname for the referral URL.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Renders a fixed top navigation header with the Urban Thekedaar logo, desktop nav buttons, and a mobile slide-out sheet menu, calling an `onNavigate` callback for section routing.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background construction image, overlay, tagline text, and two CTA buttons linking to the contact and calculator sections.
frontend/src/components/HowWeWork.tsx: Displays four engagement model cards (Fixed Price, Commission, Collaborations, Turnkey) with icons, badges, descriptions, and highlight bullet points in a two-column grid.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: A button component that handles Internet Identity login/logout using a custom hook, showing loading, authenticated, and unauthenticated states with appropriate icons.
frontend/src/components/OurFounder.tsx: Founder profile section for Pulkit Hans featuring a bio, a banner with initials avatar, and a grid of emphasis points highlighting the company's engineering and quality philosophy.
frontend/src/components/Process.tsx: Four-step construction process section rendered as cards (Site Assessment, Planning, Execution, Handover) in a two-column grid with step numbers and directional arrows.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Displays a grid of six client testimonial cards with star ratings, reviewer name, location, project type, and review text for Urban Thekedaar projects.
frontend/src/components/WhyUs.tsx: React component that renders a 'Why Choose Urban Thekedaar?' section with six feature cards (engineering, tracking, technology, workforce, transparency, on-time delivery) and a promise banner.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, admin checks, query forms, contact forms, and calculator leads/estimates.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter and Poppins fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a warm earth-tone CSS custom property palette for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback for sensitive values like admin tokens.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch variables), fonts, border radii, animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state for the Urban Thekedaar marketing/portfolio website, recording existing features (profile popup removal, hero headline update, hardcoded admin login) and pending new feature requests with metadata.
